content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed bundle.rs, contracts.rs, template_catalog.rs, and associated tests end-to-end. The implementation correctly adds Generated-mode strict validation, workstream/dependency graph helpers (infer_workstream_order, validate_dependency_graph, summarize_bundle), and enhanced render_plan_md sections (Summary, Dependency Graph, Deferred Items). Backward compatibility is preserved: validate() and materialize_bundle still accept legacy bundles. Panic-safety of the .expect() calls is preserved by canonicalize_bundle setting bead_id in all non-error match arms. Cycle detection (DFS gray/black), SCC-based interleaving (Kosaraju), and checked arithmetic in coverage calculations are all sound. All 56 bundle tests and 3 new contract tests pass; release build is clean. No critical, high, or medium severity issues. Minor cosmetic redundancies (dead check at lines 363-367 shadowed by lines 316-320; render_workstream_labels called twice; contains_deferred_note is keyword heuristic) do not warrant amendments.

## Amendments

None.
